151.summary: 151 spotlights the original 151 Pokémon in National Pokédex order, supported by modern Pokémon ex and illustration rarities.
funFacts: The main set follows National Pokédex order across the original 151 Pokémon.

30th-anniversary.summary: A PackDex-created preview containing 15 currently supported cards selected from announced 30th-anniversary material. It is not labeled as an official standalone expansion.
funFacts: PackDex labels this as a preview compilation, not an official standalone expansion.

base-set.summary: Base Set spotlights the original English Kanto card pool and the TCG's foundational presentation.
funFacts: Base Set is the first expansion in PackDex's supported English catalog.

jungle.summary: Jungle spotlights Pokémon associated with forests, grasslands, and other wild habitats.

fossil.summary: Fossil spotlights revived Fossil Pokémon alongside ancient and legendary species.

base-set-2.summary: Base Set 2 spotlights a combined selection of cards first printed in Base Set and Jungle.

team-rocket.summary: Team Rocket spotlights Team Rocket and the debut of Dark Pokémon in the English TCG.

gym-heroes.summary: Gym Heroes spotlights Kanto Gym Leaders and Pokémon identified with their Trainers.

gym-challenge.summary: Gym Challenge spotlights the later Kanto Gym Leaders and their Trainer-owned Pokémon.

neo-genesis.summary: Neo Genesis spotlights the English TCG debut of Johto Pokémon, Baby Pokémon, and Darkness and Metal Energy.

neo-discovery.summary: Neo Discovery spotlights the Ruins of Alph, Unown, and newly discovered Johto Pokémon.

neo-revelation.summary: Neo Revelation spotlights Johto's Legendary Pokémon and the first Shining Pokémon cards.

neo-destiny.summary: Neo Destiny spotlights Light Pokémon, Dark Pokémon, and a larger group of Shining Pokémon.

legendary-collection.summary: Legendary Collection spotlights reprints from the early English sets with a distinctive fireworks reverse-holo treatment.

expedition-base-set.summary: Expedition Base Set spotlights the e-Reader card layout and a broad mix of Kanto and Johto Pokémon.

aquapolis.summary: Aquapolis spotlights e-Reader-compatible cards, underwater imagery, and Crystal Pokémon.

skyridge.summary: Skyridge spotlights the final English e-Card expansion and its Crystal Pokémon.

ex-ruby-sapphire.summary: EX Ruby & Sapphire spotlights Hoenn's first partner Pokémon and the English debut of Pokémon-ex.

ex-sandstorm.summary: EX Sandstorm spotlights desert, Fossil, and Hoenn Pokémon led by the evolving Aron and Trapinch families.

ex-dragon.summary: EX Dragon spotlights Dragon Pokémon and related species from several generations.

ex-team-magma-vs-team-aqua.summary: EX Team Magma vs Team Aqua spotlights the rivalry between Team Magma and Team Aqua and their owned Pokémon.

ex-hidden-legends.summary: EX Hidden Legends spotlights Hoenn legends and ancient Pokémon, including the Regi trio.

ex-firered-leafgreen.summary: EX FireRed & LeafGreen spotlights the Kanto journey revisited through FireRed and LeafGreen.

ex-team-rocket-returns.summary: EX Team Rocket Returns spotlights Team Rocket's return through Dark Pokémon and Rocket's Pokémon-ex.

ex-deoxys.summary: EX Deoxys spotlights Deoxys, Rayquaza, and the space-themed conflict surrounding them.

ex-emerald.summary: EX Emerald spotlights the Hoenn region as presented in Pokémon Emerald, including its first partners and legends.

ex-unseen-forces.summary: EX Unseen Forces spotlights Unown, Lugia, Ho-Oh, and Pokémon tied to unseen powers.

ex-delta-species.summary: EX Delta Species spotlights the Holon research setting and Pokémon with unusual δ Delta Species types.

ex-legend-maker.summary: EX Legend Maker spotlights legendary and ancient Pokémon presented alongside new Pokémon-ex.

ex-holon-phantoms.summary: EX Holon Phantoms spotlights Holon's mysterious mirages and another large group of δ Delta Species Pokémon.

ex-crystal-guardians.summary: EX Crystal Guardians spotlights a tropical island setting with Crystal Guardians and δ Delta Species Pokémon.

ex-dragon-frontiers.summary: EX Dragon Frontiers spotlights Dragon-themed frontiers populated by δ Delta Species Pokémon.

ex-power-keepers.summary: EX Power Keepers spotlights powerful Hoenn Pokémon and the final English expansion of the Pokémon-ex era.

diamond-pearl.summary: Diamond & Pearl spotlights the English TCG debut of Sinnoh Pokémon and Pokémon LV.X.

diamond-pearl-mysterious-treasures.summary: Diamond & Pearl—Mysterious Treasures spotlights Sinnoh's legendary Pokémon and treasures linked to the region's myths.

diamond-pearl-secret-wonders.summary: Diamond & Pearl—Secret Wonders spotlights a broad Sinnoh roster joined by powerful legendary Pokémon.

diamond-pearl-great-encounters.summary: Diamond & Pearl—Great Encounters spotlights legendary encounters involving Dialga, Palkia, Darkrai, and Cresselia.

diamond-pearl-majestic-dawn.summary: Diamond & Pearl—Majestic Dawn spotlights Eevee's Evolutions and prominent Sinnoh Pokémon.

diamond-pearl-legends-awakened.summary: Diamond & Pearl—Legends Awakened spotlights Sinnoh's Lake Guardians and other awakened legendary Pokémon.

diamond-pearl-stormfront.summary: Diamond & Pearl—Stormfront spotlights a gathering storm around Sinnoh Pokémon, Pokémon LV.X, and classic-card reinterpretations.

platinum.summary: Platinum spotlights Giratina, the Distortion World, and the debut of Pokémon SP.

platinum-rising-rivals.summary: Platinum—Rising Rivals spotlights rival Trainers, Gym Leaders, and Frontier Brains represented through Pokémon SP.

platinum-supreme-victors.summary: Platinum—Supreme Victors spotlights Champion and villain-associated Pokémon SP alongside powerful Pokémon LV.X.

platinum-arceus.summary: Platinum—Arceus spotlights Arceus cards spanning multiple types and the final Platinum-series expansion.

heartgold-soulsilver.summary: HeartGold & SoulSilver spotlights a return to Johto with Pokémon Prime and two-card Pokémon LEGEND.

hs-unleashed.summary: HS—Unleashed spotlights Johto legends including Entei, Raikou, and Suicune in Prime and LEGEND-era designs.

hs-undaunted.summary: HS—Undaunted spotlights Darkness- and Metal-themed Johto Pokémon with Pokémon Prime and LEGEND cards.

hs-triumphant.summary: HS—Triumphant spotlights the climax of the HeartGold & SoulSilver block with new Prime and LEGEND pairings.

call-of-legends.summary: Call of Legends spotlights legendary Pokémon, Shiny Pokémon, and Energy cards with dedicated Pokémon artwork.

black-white.summary: Black & White spotlights the English TCG debut of Unova Pokémon and the era's new card frame.

black-white-emerging-powers.summary: Black & White—Emerging Powers spotlights Unova Pokémon beginning to reveal their strength after the base expansion.

black-white-noble-victories.summary: Black & White—Noble Victories spotlights Victini, the Unova first partners' final Evolutions, and other Unova legends.

black-white-next-destinies.summary: Black & White—Next Destinies spotlights Mewtwo-EX and the return of multi-Prize Pokémon-EX.

black-white-dark-explorers.summary: Black & White—Dark Explorers spotlights Darkness-type Pokémon and Darkrai-EX leading a shadowed Unova roster.

black-white-dragons-exalted.summary: Black & White—Dragons Exalted spotlights Dragon-type Pokémon making their English TCG debut as a dedicated type.

dragon-vault.summary: Dragon Vault spotlights an all-Dragon mini expansion built around Dragon-type Pokémon.

black-white-boundaries-crossed.summary: Black & White—Boundaries Crossed spotlights Pokémon-EX and the English debut of ACE SPEC Trainer cards.

black-white-plasma-storm.summary: Black & White—Plasma Storm spotlights Team Plasma cards and their distinctive blue-bordered presentation.

black-white-plasma-freeze.summary: Black & White—Plasma Freeze spotlights Team Plasma's frozen takeover led by Deoxys-EX and Thundurus-EX.

black-white-plasma-blast.summary: Black & White—Plasma Blast spotlights Genesect-EX, Team Plasma, and the final Team Plasma expansion.

black-white-legendary-treasures.summary: Black & White—Legendary Treasures spotlights legendary Pokémon and the first Radiant Collection subset.

xy0.summary: XY-Kalos Starter Set spotlights the Kalos first partners and introductory cards for the XY Series.

xy1.summary: XY spotlights the English TCG debut of Kalos Pokémon, Fairy type, and Mega Evolution Pokémon-EX.

xy2.summary: XY-Flashfire spotlights Charizard and Mega Charizard forms at the center of a Fire-heavy expansion.

xy3.summary: XY-Furious Fists spotlights Fighting-type Pokémon and Mega Lucario-EX in a battle-focused expansion.

xy4.summary: XY-Phantom Forces spotlights the spirit-world theme of Mega Gengar-EX, Diancie-EX, and the debut of Pokémon Tool F cards.

xy5.summary: XY-Primal Clash spotlights Primal Groudon, Primal Kyogre, and Ancient Traits inspired by Hoenn.

dc1.summary: Double Crisis spotlights the renewed conflict between Team Magma and Team Aqua in a compact special expansion.

xy6.summary: XY-Roaring Skies spotlights Mega Rayquaza-EX and Dragon- and Sky-themed Pokémon from Hoenn.

xy7.summary: XY-Ancient Origins spotlights Hoopa-EX, ancient Pokémon, and multiple Mega Evolution Pokémon-EX.

xy8.summary: XY-BREAKthrough spotlights Mewtwo, Mega Mewtwo, and the English debut of Pokémon BREAK.

xy9.summary: XY-BREAKpoint spotlights a fractured-world theme led by Gyarados, Greninja, and additional Pokémon BREAK.

g1.summary: Generations spotlights Pokémon's 20th anniversary, a Trainer's journey, and the second Radiant Collection.
funFacts: Generations includes the second Radiant Collection subset.

xy10.summary: XY-Fates Collide spotlights Zygarde, Alakazam, and the legends connected to Kalos.

xy11.summary: XY-Steam Siege spotlights dual-type Shiny Pokémon and the conflict surrounding Volcanion and Magearna.

xy12.summary: XY-Evolutions spotlights the original Base Set presentation reimagined for the XY Series.

sun-moon.summary: Sun & Moon spotlights the English TCG debut of Alolan Pokémon and Pokémon-GX.

guardians-rising.summary: Guardians Rising spotlights Alola's guardian deities, Island Challenge figures, and Pokémon-GX.

burning-shadows.summary: Burning Shadows spotlights Necrozma, Marshadow, and Fire- and Darkness-themed Pokémon-GX.

shining-legends.summary: Shining Legends spotlights Shining Pokémon and legendary Pokémon in a compact special expansion.

crimson-invasion.summary: Crimson Invasion spotlights Ultra Beasts arriving in Alola alongside Silvally-GX.

ultra-prism.summary: Ultra Prism spotlights the Ultra Prism story of Solgaleo, Lunala, Necrozma, and the debut of Prism Star cards.

forbidden-light.summary: Forbidden Light spotlights Ultra Necrozma and the light-and-shadow conflict surrounding Kalos and Alola.

celestial-storm.summary: Celestial Storm spotlights Rayquaza-GX, Hoenn favorites, and a storm of nature-themed Pokémon.

dragon-majesty.summary: Dragon Majesty spotlights Dragon Pokémon and legendary dragons in a special expansion.

lost-thunder.summary: Lost Thunder spotlights Zeraora-GX, Lugia-GX, and Pokémon drawn from Alola and Johto.

team-up.summary: Team Up spotlights the debut of TAG TEAM Pokémon-GX pairs led by Pikachu & Zekrom-GX.

detective-pikachu.summary: Detective Pikachu spotlights Pokémon as they appear in the POKÉMON Detective Pikachu film.

unbroken-bonds.summary: Unbroken Bonds spotlights partner bonds represented by TAG TEAM Pokémon-GX, including Reshiram & Charizard-GX.

unified-minds.summary: Unified Minds spotlights Mewtwo & Mew-GX and other TAG TEAM pairings built around shared power.

hidden-fates.summary: Hidden Fates spotlights Shiny Pokémon in the Shiny Vault subset alongside Pokémon-GX.

cosmic-eclipse.summary: Cosmic Eclipse spotlights the finale of the Sun & Moon Series, with TAG TEAM Pokémon-GX and character cards.

sword-shield.summary: Sword & Shield spotlights the English TCG debut of Galar Pokémon, Pokémon V, and Pokémon VMAX.

rebel-clash.summary: Rebel Clash spotlights Galar's rebellious rivals and the Gigantamax forms of its first partners.

darkness-ablaze.summary: Darkness Ablaze spotlights Eternatus VMAX and Charizard VMAX leading a Darkness- and Fire-tinged expansion.

champions-path.summary: Champion's Path spotlights the Galar Gym Challenge and its Champion-focused special expansion.

vivid-voltage.summary: Vivid Voltage spotlights Gigantamax Pikachu and the debut of Amazing Rare cards.

shining-fates.summary: Shining Fates spotlights Shiny Pokémon in the Shiny Vault alongside Pokémon V and VMAX.

battle-styles.summary: Battle Styles spotlights the debut of Single Strike and Rapid Strike cards.
funFacts: Single Strike and Rapid Strike cards were introduced in this expansion.

chilling-reign.summary: Chilling Reign spotlights Calyrex and the Galarian Legendary birds in the Crown Tundra.

evolving-skies.summary: Evolving Skies spotlights Eevee's Evolutions and Dragon-type Pokémon V and VMAX.

celebrations.summary: Celebrations spotlights Pokémon's 25th anniversary and a Classic Collection revisiting historic cards.
funFacts: Celebrations includes a Classic Collection that revisits cards from earlier TCG eras.

fusion-strike.summary: Fusion Strike spotlights the debut of Fusion Strike Style alongside Single Strike and Rapid Strike.

brilliant-stars.summary: Brilliant Stars spotlights Arceus VSTAR, the debut of Pokémon VSTAR, and the Trainer Gallery.

astral-radiance.summary: Astral Radiance spotlights Hisuian Pokémon, Origin Forme legends, Radiant Pokémon, and the Trainer Gallery.

pokemon-go.summary: Pokemon GO spotlights Pokémon and locations drawn from the Pokémon GO mobile game.

lost-origin.summary: Lost Origin spotlights Giratina VSTAR, the Lost Zone, Hisuian Pokémon, and the Trainer Gallery.

silver-tempest.summary: Silver Tempest spotlights Lugia VSTAR, Regieleki, Regidrago, and the final Trainer Gallery.

crown-zenith.summary: Crown Zenith spotlights the Sword & Shield finale and its illustration-rich Galarian Gallery.

scarlet-violet.summary: Scarlet & Violet spotlights the English TCG debut of Paldean Pokémon, lowercase Pokémon ex, and Illustration Rares.

paldea-evolved.summary: Paldea Evolved spotlights the Paldea first partners' final Evolutions, more Pokémon ex, and expanded illustration rarities.

obsidian-flames.summary: Obsidian Flames spotlights a Darkness-type Tera Charizard ex and type-shifted Tera Pokémon ex.

paradox-rift.summary: Paradox Rift spotlights Ancient and Future Pokémon, including Roaring Moon ex and Iron Valiant ex.

paldean-fates.summary: Paldean Fates spotlights Shiny Paldean Pokémon and Shiny Pokémon ex.

temporal-forces.summary: Temporal Forces spotlights Walking Wake ex, Iron Leaves ex, and the return of ACE SPEC cards.
funFacts: ACE SPEC cards returned to English expansions in Temporal Forces.

twilight-masquerade.summary: Twilight Masquerade spotlights Ogerpon and the Kitakami festival introduced in The Teal Mask.

shrouded-fable.summary: Shrouded Fable spotlights Pecharunt ex, the Loyal Three, and Kitakami's hidden history.

stellar-crown.summary: Stellar Crown spotlights Stellar Tera Pokémon ex led by Terapagos ex and the Terarium.

surging-sparks.summary: Surging Sparks spotlights Stellar Tera Pikachu ex and a lineup of Dragon Pokémon.

prismatic-evolutions.summary: Prismatic Evolutions spotlights Eevee and all eight of its Evolutions as Stellar Tera Pokémon ex.

journey-together.summary: Journey Together spotlights the return of Trainer's Pokémon, including N's, Lillie's, Iono's, and Hop's partners.

destined-rivals.summary: Destined Rivals spotlights Trainer's Pokémon facing Team Rocket and Giovanni's Pokémon.

black-bolt.summary: Black Bolt spotlights Unova Pokémon split across a paired expansion, led by Zekrom ex.
funFacts: Black Bolt and White Flare share the same English release date and split their Unova focus across two sets.

white-flare.summary: White Flare spotlights Unova Pokémon split across a paired expansion, led by Reshiram ex.
funFacts: White Flare and Black Bolt share the same English release date and split their Unova focus across two sets.

mega-evolution.summary: Mega Evolution spotlights the return of Mega Evolution Pokémon ex, led by Mega Lucario ex and Mega Gardevoir ex.

phantasmal-flames.summary: Phantasmal Flames spotlights Mega Charizard X ex alongside Mega Gengar ex, Mega Lopunny ex, and Mega Sharpedo ex.

ascended-heroes.summary: Ascended Heroes spotlights Mega Dragonite ex, Trainer's Pokémon, and Stellar Tera Pokémon ex.

perfect-order.summary: Perfect Order spotlights Lumiose City and Kalos lore, led by Mega Zygarde ex.

chaos-rising.summary: Chaos Rising spotlights new Mega Evolution Pokémon ex led by Mega Greninja ex and Mega Floette ex.

pitch-black.summary: Pitch Black spotlights Mega Darkrai ex and a Darkness-focused Mega Evolution roster.
funFacts: Pitch Black's supported catalog contains 120 cards, including Mega Darkrai ex as its Mega Hyper Rare.
